span.p: No - single pre-registered primary

span.p:
Exploratory / screening
you will follow up on the hits

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Per-hypothesis, want max power

span.p:
Simple, very few tests,
or a CI you must also adjust

span.p:
Independent / positively dependent
the usual case

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Arbitrary / unknown dependence
must guarantee control

span.p: Reporting significance across a family of tests

span.p: More than one comparison in the family?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
No correction needed
report effect size + CI

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Confirmatory or exploratory?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Control FWER
P at least one false positive

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Control FDR
expected proportion of false discoveries

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Need per-hypothesis decisions,
or just a global gate?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Holm step-down
uniformly beats Bonferroni - default FWER

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bonferroni
alpha / m - simplest, most conservative

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Tests independent or positively dependent?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Benjamini-Hochberg step-up
default FDR

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Benjamini-Yekutieli
BH with the harmonic penalty

span.p: Headline: effect size + CI, not the bare p
